response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Google, which aligns with parts of the role. However, the resume shows limited demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), and cloud-based AI delivery — core requirements for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI Engineer. Python is also notably absent from the listed skills, and customer-facing technical discovery leadership is not evidenced.
strengths: 13+ years of production software engineering across backend, full-stack, and infra
Recent Google experience touching MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong TypeScript/Node.js background plus DevOps, Docker, and Kubernetes deployment experience
concerns: No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Python not listed in skills; AI work appears tooling-adjacent rather than core GenAI delivery
No evidence of customer-facing forward-deployed/consulting work or leading technical discovery

key_factors.factor: Missing core GenAI stack (RAG, vector DBs, multi-agent frameworks)
Recent MCP and agentic workflow work at Google
